message:
fix: Add fstring and comprehension handling to variable capture

collectReferencedVarsInExpr was missing handlers for fstring,
listcomp, dictcomp, genexp, and lambda expressions. This caused
variables used in f-strings inside try blocks to not be captured
as TryHelper parameters, leading to "variable not accessible from
inner function" errors in Zig codegen.

Also added getScopedVar check in try_except.zig to properly capture
for-loop iteration variables.
